description: Eval cases for concurrency issues: race conditions, deadlocks, async misuse

cases.name: Shared variable without synchronization
cases.description: Counter incremented by multiple threads without lock
cases.code_snippet:
counter = 0

def increment():
    global counter
    counter += 1  # Not thread-safe

cases.name: Sequential async operations
cases.description: Awaiting in loop instead of parallel execution

cases.name: Potential deadlock with nested locks
cases.code_snippet:
def transfer(from_account, to_account, amount):
    from_account.lock.acquire()
    to_account.lock.acquire()
    # Transfer logic
    to_account.lock.release()
    from_account.lock.release()

cases.name: Thread-unsafe collection
cases.description: Using non-thread-safe collection from multiple threads

cases.name: Missing await on async function
Proper lock usage
cases.description: Synchronized access should not be flagged
cases.code_snippet:
import threading

counter = 0
lock = threading.Lock()

def increment():
    global counter
    with lock:
        counter += 1
